text:
The Pure Paladin Squad (, Seirintai) was a team of versatile Hunters that the late Chairman Isaac Netero once belonged to. The members were so skilled that they are considered by other Hunters as legendary. It is unknown if they had any particular benefit aside from prestige. The group was disbanded under unknown circumstances. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 329 

Original Members

Isaac Netero - the 12 th Chairman of the Hunter Association and was once considered the strongest Nen user in the world during his prime. 

Plot

13 th Hunter Chairman Election arc

Teradein Neutral, Bushidora Ambitious, and Loupe Highland made an attempt to reform the Pure Paladin Squad during the 13 th Hunter Chairman Election, until Bushidora and Teradein were killed by Hisoka. And before Teradein was killed by Hisoka, he tried to convince Morel Mackernasey to join the group. Morel refused and during an announcement refuting what Teradein said during a previous announcement told them that they are too weak to even claim the name of the group. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 330 

Trivia

In Hunter × Hunter: The Last Mission, they were the group sent by the Hunter Association to eliminate the Shadow. https://www.vap.co.jp/hxh-movie/index.html
